Weekly Railroad Traffic

For the week ending May 10, 2025, U.S. railroads reported combined weekly carloads and intermodal units.

Total U.S. weekly railroad traffic for the week ending May 10, 2025 was 576,285 carloads and intermodal units.

Carloads by Commodity Group

Week Ending May 10, 2025 Year-Ago Comparison
Commodity Group Current Week Carloads Current Week Intermodal Units Year-Ago Carloads Carloads YoY Change Intermodal YoY Change
Grain 22,451 0 21,390 (+5.0%) (+0.0%)
Coal 65,234 0 68,102 (-4.2%) (+0.0%)
Chemicals 31,087 1,200 29,875 (+4.1%) (+2.5%)
Petroleum and Petroleum Products 11,342 0 12,010 (-5.6%) (+0.0%)
Nonmetallic Minerals 18,765 500 17,930 (+4.7%) (+1.2%)
Forest Products 9,832 2,100 10,205 (-3.7%) (+8.3%)
Motor Vehicles and Parts 14,521 3,400 13,987 (+3.8%) (+12.1%)
Food and Farm Products 16,903 800 16,450 (+2.8%) (-1.5%)
Metals and Metal Products 20,112 1,100 19,843 (+1.4%) (+3.2%)
Stone, Clay and Glass Products 13,678 600 14,201 (-3.7%) (+6.0%)
Waste and Nonferrous Scrap 8,543 0 8,120 (+5.2%) (+0.0%)
